field_values.action_summary: Following the combat, Carter is recognized as having won the "spoils" of the deceased warrior. By acquiring his regalia and weapons, Carter is inadvertently elevated to the status of a Thark chieftain.
field_values.emotional_beat: From shock/violence to formal recognition and awe.
field_values.camera_intent: Medium shots of regalia being presented or donned; Reaction shots of Thark Council members recognizing status change
field_values.end_state: scene resolves into the next narrative beat
movement_notes: Specific weapons and regalia items held or worn by john_carter
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH010_SC004

## Production Intent
Establish the formal transition of john_carter from combatant to Thark chieftain through the ritualized acquisition of spoils. The scene must emphasize the weight and physical presence of the regalia to validate the shift in social hierarchy within the thark_audience_chamber.

## Required Cast
- john_carter
- lorquas_ptomel
- tars_tarkas
- Thark Council

## Required Environments
- thark_audience_chamber

## Continuity Constraints
- Specific weapons and regalia items held or worn by john_carter
- Physical state of john_carter post-combat

## Beat List
- BT001: Acquisition of the spoils
- BT002: Recognition by the Council
- BT003: Formal elevation
field_values.dialogue_relevance: dialogue supports scene intent and continuity
